programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Det frygtløse hold bag Ghost Adventures er tilbage! I hver episode rejser spøgelsesjægerne Zak Bagans og Aaron Goodwin sammen med teknikerne Billy Tolley og Jay Wasley til en hjemsøgt destination, hvor de mødes med lokale, øjenvidner og eksperter for at undersøge spøgelseshistorierne fra hvert sted. Ved hjælp af den nyeste, videnskabelige teknologi og gadgets sætter holdet deres efterforskning i gang om natten, hvor de konfronterer den paranormale aktivitet og dokumenterer beviserne i håbet om at afdække sandheden bag hvert af de hjemsøgende mysterier.

programme.title: In the Heart of the Sea
programme.desc: I vinteren 1820 sætter hvalbåden Essex kurs mod det sydlige Atlanterhav. Det endelige mål ligger omtrent 3.000 km ud for Sydamerikas kyst, hvor der går rygter om en stor bestanddel af hvaler, der jages for deres dyrebare spermacet. Her støder Owen Chase og resten af besætningen på en gigantisk, hvid kaskelothval, som de først forsøger at dræbe, men som viser sig at være langt sværere at harpunere end som så. Og så besidder hvalen en nærmest menneskelig form for hævntørst. Besætningen kastes ud i et sandt mareridt til søs, hvor de ikke blot skal forsøge at få dræbt hvalen, men også kæmpe sig igennem gigantiske stormvejr, omfattende sult og rendyrket panik!

programme.title: The Godfather Part III
programme.desc: Den berygtede, men aldrende mafialeder Michael Corleone har to vigtige missioner i livet: at gøre sit familiedynasti lovligt og at finde en passende efterfølger. Denne efterfølger kunne være den fyrige Vincent Mancini. Men Vincents iltre temperament kan potentielt også spænde ben for Michaels drømme om at gøre familieforetagendet lovligt.

programme.desc: Todd Hoffman og hans kammerater risikerede alt i Sydamerika og tabte. programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: The long-running game show sees more rival antique collectors test their skills at spotting a bargain. Two teams - the reds and the blues - set out with just £300 and one hour to scour an antiques fair and buy three items to sell at auction. An antiques expert guides each team, giving them hints and tips on what to buy in the hope they make more profit than their rivals when their items go under the hammer.

programme.desc: People seeking more peace and quiet are trading the bustling city for a new life in the picturesque countryside. The presenters travel across Britain in search of their dream home. House hunters are shown two properties they like, but the surprise house is something completely different than what they requested and could potentially turn their entire search upside down.

programme.title: Clean It, Fix It

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Some of Britains leading antiques experts take to the road in a collection of classic cars. Along the way, they compete against each other to make the most money and buy and sell the most antiques. Each expert has a budget of £200, which they must increase as they sell more items. They compete individually, but travel together in pairs. Expertise, egos and reputations are at stake, and the series concludes with a spectacular auction finale.

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Drama series about a team of forensic pathologists returns for a 21st Series. Haunted by her experiences in Mexico, Nikki Alexander is struggling to come to terms with life back home. programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Deep in Alaska, the primal way lives on. Fight the freeze, brave the wild, hold on to your sanity. And winter is no wonderland when temperatures plummet far below zero. This series follows the drama and hardships experienced by Alaskan households in different corners of this merciless territory as they battle to survive, thrive, and live life on their own terms.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben Fogle journeys across the globe to meet individuals who have abandoned the pressures of modern life in favor of simpler, more self-sufficient living. Along the way, he explores their unique lifestyles, the challenges they face, and the freedoms they’ve discovered by stepping away from the conventional rat race.

programme.title: Inside the Factory
programme.desc: Gregg Wallace and Cherry Healey hit factory floors across Britain for a snoop around their supersized production lines. What are the secrets behind our supermarket staples?

programme.title: The Worlds Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: Footage capturing the destruction and chaos caused by severe weather conditions, featuring first-hand accounts from those who have survived such events.

programme.title: Bagedyst: De professionelle
programme.desc: Tre hold professionelle bagere dyster hver gang om at bage de lækreste kager, og der er nerver på fra start. Dommerne er nemlig nogle af Storbritanniens største navne inden for den branche! Tom Kerridge er vært og byder velkommen til dagens tre hold, der blandt andet bliver udfordret i tusindbladskager, italienske ostefyldte butterdejsskaller og ikke mindst små kuppelformede lækkerier. Ambitionerne er høje, og det samme er risikoen, men kan holdene imponere dommerne?

programme.title: Joanna Lumleys Hidden Caribbean: Havana til Haiti
programme.desc: Cuba og Haiti er to af de mest gådefulde lande i Caribien. Begge sårbare og fattige samfund, men rige på historie og kultur. Den britiske skuespillerinde Joanna Lumley rejser gennem de to kontrastfyldte stater for at finde de skjulte perler - fra byer fulde af farverige gader til uberørte strande, majestætiske bjerge og frodige skove.

programme.title: Joanna Lumleys usynlige eventyr

programme.title: Fint skal det være
programme.desc: Den propre og strikse Hyacinth Bucket driver sine omgivelser og ikke mindst sin hårdt prøvede ægtemand, Richard, til vanvid med sin evindelige rengøringsmani, leflen for det finere borgerskab, sit elskede te-stel og trang til at bryde ud i sang.

programme.title: Falsk eller formue?
programme.desc: Et hold eksperter anvender detektivfærdigheder og nye teknikker til at afsløre historier om forsvundne mesterværker, falsknere og kunst røvet af nazisterne.

programme.title: Den store britiske bagedyst
programme.desc: 12 deltagere konkurrerer om at blive Storbritanniens bedste amatørbager. Undervejs møder de udfordringer, der sætter deres bageevner på prøve. Hver uge skal den person, der klarer sig dårligst, forlade programmet, og til sidst står kun vinderen tilbage!

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham Norton præsenterer et livligt chatshow med folk, trends og historier, der fænger hans interesse.

programme.title: Michael McIntyres store show
programme.desc: "Doctor Who"-stjernen Bradley Walsh overdrager sin telefon i indslaget "Send to All". Popstjernen Kylie Minogue hjælper Michael med at overraske folk i publikum, før hun optræder sammen med Jack Savoretti.

programme.title: The Weakest Link Celebrity Specials
programme.desc: Komikeren Romesh Ranganathan overtager det svigefulde, højt satsende game show. Kan deltagerne danne en kæde af svar, så de undgår at ende som Weakest Link?

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Klar til afgang! Bevæbnet med sin trofaste Bradshaws-guidebog udforsker Michael Portillo Europas smukkeste og mest forførende regioner og opdager, hvordan jernbanen har formet kontinentet.

programme.title: Bagedyst: De professionelle
programme.desc: Tre hold professionelle bagere dyster hver gang om at bage de lækreste kager, og der er nerver på fra start. Dommerne er nemlig nogle af Storbritanniens største navne inden for den branche! Tom Kerridge er vært og byder velkommen til dagens tre hold, der blandt andet bliver udfordret i tusindbladskager, italienske ostefyldte butterdejsskaller og ikke mindst små kuppelformede lækkerier. Ambitionerne er høje, og det samme er risikoen, men kan holdene imponere dommerne?

programme.title: Døden i paradis
programme.desc: En varm, lethjertet detektiv-serie, der finder sted på den fantastiske ø Saint-Marie. En vestlig detektiv er en fisk, der er ude af vand, når han tilslutter sig en politisk styrke i de karibiske øer. Med nyt forbløffende mysterium til at løse hver episode, vil Death in Paradise intrige og friste.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: QI is a quiz show packed with quirky and surprising facts where contestants are rewarded not just for correct answers but for responses that are “quite interesting.” The show blends humor, curiosity, and clever banter, encouraging players to think outside the box. Its unique format creates an entertaining and unpredictable experience that celebrates knowledge in all its curious forms.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: The toughest Bake Off of them all is back. Twelve teams from across Britain compete to craft exquisite entremets, delicious desserts and spectacular showpieces.

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth Bucket (pronounced “Bouquet,”) has elevated snobbery to an art form. Determined to climb the social ladder, she’s on a constant mission to impress. Unfortunately, her eccentric and less-refined family make that task nearly impossible—but Hyacinth won’t be deterred. Ever proper, ever persistent, she insists on keeping up appearances no matter the chaos around her.

programme.title: Fake or Fortune?
programme.desc: Journalist Fiona Bruce teams up with art dealer Philip Mould -- dubbed "the art detective" -- to investigate remarkable stories beneath the surface of paintings. From Paris and Amsterdam to Cape Town, the banks of the Nile, and New York, the team employs old-fashioned detective skills and the latest forensic testing to reveal compelling tales of lost masterpieces, forgers and Nazi-looted art. The episodes include an investigation into what the hosts believe is an unrecognized and valuable painting by Monet.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve homebakers take part in a bake off, which will test every aspect of their baking skills as they battle it out to be crowned the Great British Bake Offs Best Amateur Baker. Each episode tests different aspects of their baking skills through a signature bake, a technical challenge, and a showstopper.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The irreverent BAFTA award-winning chat show hosted by Graham Norton. Each episode is brim full of chat, comedy, celebrity gossip and hilarious absurdities. Theres just enough risque material to make viewers and guests cringe with delight and at the end of each episode, Graham introduces some of the best contemporary music acts to wrap things up and finish the show off with a bang.

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: Michael McIntyres very special comedy entertainment show arrives on Comedy Central, with big stars, big laughs and big surprises!

programme.title: The Weakest Link Celebrity Specials
programme.desc: Comedian Romesh Ranganathan takes charge of the back-stabbing, big money, game show. Can the contestants create a chain of answers and avoid being the weakest link?

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: One of the most famous bibliographic references of all time, George Bradshaws Guide to the Continental Railway, serves as the guidebook for this documentary series. A total of five episodes will showcase the different European routes covered in this guide, published in 1913, which marked a turning point for British tourists during the Edwardian era. Gleaming cosmopolitan cities, alpine landscapes, warm, sparkling seas, and picturesque villages are some of the places Bradshaw describes in his book, known precisely for sparking an interest among English citizens in the exoticism of foreign travel.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off For Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Celebrities come together for a bake-off in support of a charity for cancer by whipping up a variety of delicious cakes, pastries and other baked goods.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A warm, witty, and light-hearted detective series following a British inspector sent to the sun-soaked Caribbean island of Saint-Marie. Amid stunning beaches and vibrant island life, he tackles puzzling murders with sharp instincts and a touch of humor, blending classic whodunit intrigue with the laid-back charm of paradise.

programme.title: Planet Earth III: Making Of
programme.desc: Our home - thrilling, mind-blowing, and full of hope. David Attenborough shares amazing stories of the wonders of the planet. Theres always more to discover.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben Fogle journeys across the globe to meet individuals who have abandoned the pressures of modern life in favor of simpler, more self-sufficient living. Along the way, he explores their unique lifestyles, the challenges they face, and the freedoms they’ve discovered by stepping away from the conventional rat race.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Airing since 1979, the British series travels the country (with occasional trips to other countries, such as Canada and Australia), bringing together in each location specialists in antiques and fine arts to have them appraise items brought in by local residents, whether they are collectors looking to turn trash into treasure or ordinary folks hoping Grandmas old painting might now fund the kids education. Items featured on the show often have an interesting story attached to them or have some connection to that episodes venue. While some items that are brought in are worth a fortune, others are worthless.

programme.title: Joanna Lumleys Unseen Adventures

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off For Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Celebrities come together for a bake-off in support of a charity for cancer by whipping up a variety of delicious cakes, pastries and other baked goods.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A warm, witty, and light-hearted detective series following a British inspector sent to the sun-soaked Caribbean island of Saint-Marie. Amid stunning beaches and vibrant island life, he tackles puzzling murders with sharp instincts and a touch of humor, blending classic whodunit intrigue with the laid-back charm of paradise.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben Fogle journeys across the globe to meet individuals who have abandoned the pressures of modern life in favor of simpler, more self-sufficient living. Along the way, he explores their unique lifestyles, the challenges they face, and the freedoms they’ve discovered by stepping away from the conventional rat race.

programme.title: 8 Out Of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Hosted by the ever-witty Jimmy Carr, the stars of 8 Out of 10 Cats team up with celebrity guests to take on the iconic words and numbers game show. With comedians battling brains and banter, it’s a uniquely entertaining twist that blends panel show fun with the challenge of Countdown.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The irreverent BAFTA award-winning chat show hosted by Graham Norton. Each episode is brim full of chat, comedy, celebrity gossip and hilarious absurdities. programme.title: Bækkens børn
programme.desc: Snup et papsværd og tag med bedstevennerne Craig, JP og Kelsey, på deres farefulde færd ved bækken. En verden der styres af en flok spraglede unger, som skaber eventyrlige scenarier og fantasifulde situationer, der gør hver dag til en fortryllende oplevelse.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Den kampsport-elskende Lan Jun, en helt særlig teenageheltinde, der skal lære sin families ældgamle hemmeligheder og afsløre det uventede, alt imens hun navigerer i livet som teenager.

programme.title: Den tapre prins Ivandoes heroiske færd
programme.desc: I en verden af helte, kongelige rivaliseringer og magiske eventyrvæsner, følger vi en ung mand på sit livs eventyr. Ledsaget af sin loyale væbner Bert, drager prins Ivandoe ud på en rejse gennem De Fem Kongeriger for at gøre krav på den gyldne fjer.

programme.desc: Følg Mordecai og Rigbys skøre og surrealistiske eventyr, når de to bedste venner udkæmper en daglig kamp mod den skrupskøre chef Benson.

programme.title: Steven Univers
programme.desc: Steven har ikke så mange magiske kræfter som Ædelstenene, men det holder ham ikke tilbage fra at tage med når Granat, Ametyst og Perle tager på deres magiske eventyr - Hvor han altid ender med at redder dagen.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: Den kampsport-elskende Lan Jun, en helt særlig teenageheltinde, der skal lære sin families ældgamle hemmeligheder og afsløre det uventede, alt imens hun navigerer i livet som teenager.

programme.title: Den tapre prins Ivandoes heroiske færd
programme.desc: I en verden af helte, kongelige rivaliseringer og magiske eventyrvæsner, følger vi en ung mand på sit livs eventyr. Ledsaget af sin loyale væbner Bert, drager prins Ivandoe ud på en rejse gennem De Fem Kongeriger for at gøre krav på den gyldne fjer.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programme.desc: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary. Whether hes battling an evil fast-food empire, facing off against a sentient AI in love with his mom, or trying to stop Banana Joe from wearing pants, Gumball Watterson drags his brother Darwin, sister Anais, and the rest of the town of Elmore along for the ride.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programme.desc: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary. Whether hes battling an evil fast-food empire, facing off against a sentient AI in love with his mom, or trying to stop Banana Joe from wearing pants, Gumball Watterson drags his brother Darwin, sister Anais, and the rest of the town of Elmore along for the ride.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball’s world is pretty run-of-the-mill. He’s chased around school by a T-Rex. He has a friend named Anton who’s a piece of toast. He’s got a crush on Penny, a peanut with antlers. His dad is a 6’4” bunny. His mom works at a Rainbow Factory. And his brother is a goldfish named Darwin. Yup, everything looks perfectly normal.

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Folks, have ya heard? Your favorite Looney Tunes characters are back! Featuring updated stories and everyone’s favorite characters, these all-new animated episodes revitalize the iconic series known and loved for decades. Back to their old tricks are Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, and other marquee Looney Tunes characters who promise to delight audiences young and old with their zany adventures, slapstick comedy, and madcap energy. Get ready to have some fun – that’s all, folks!

programme.title: Bunnicula
programme.desc: Bunnicula is an animated comedy series based on the bestselling childrens book of the same name. The series features the paranormal comedy adventures of Bunnicula the vampire rabbit, Chester the paranoid cat, and Harold the loyal family dog. Together, our heroes protect their owner Mina and the city of New Orleans from spooky supernatural creatures… including Bunnicula himself!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: From Warner Bros. Animation, these teen titans are on the go! Right after they make a sandwich or play some video games. Wait, theres laundry to do? ("Not it!") After that, theyll definitely go fight some crime. Maybe. Dont miss the return of Robin, Starfire, Raven, Beast Boy and Cyborg - teen super heroes who are totally unsupervised!.

programme.desc: A clever little boy from a suburban town in Maryland loves exploring and playing at his neighbourhood creek, where he convinces his two best friends to join him on various journeys that turn their normal afternoons into magical adventures.

programme.title: Dexters Laboratory
programme.desc: Meet Dexter, half Einstein and half third-grader. This boy genius creates awesome inventions in a space-age lab attached to his room, but no genius is without trouble! Dexters space-brained sister, Dee Dee, is always messing up his work, and his dorky rival, Mandark, is constantly trying to one-up him. Time to fight fire with — science!

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Folks, have ya heard? Your favorite Looney Tunes characters are back! Featuring updated stories and everyone’s favorite characters, these all-new animated episodes revitalize the iconic series known and loved for decades. Back to their old tricks are Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, and other marquee Looney Tunes characters who promise to delight audiences young and old with their zany adventures, slapstick comedy, and madcap energy. Get ready to have some fun – that’s all, folks!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

Featuring updated stories and everyone’s favorite characters, these all-new animated episodes revitalize the iconic series known and loved for decades. Back to their old tricks are Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, and other marquee Looney Tunes characters who promise to delight audiences young and old with their zany adventures, slapstick comedy, and madcap energy. Get ready to have some fun – that’s all, folks!

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: Tiny Toons Looniversity follows Babs and Buster Bunny, Sweetie Bird, Hamton J. Pig, and Plucky Duck as they learn what it takes to be a professional toon under the tutelage of Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck and other looney legends.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Three teenage girls from Beverly Hills attempt to balance their lives as students with their undercover work as super-spies for an elite international agency, battling an array of bizarre criminals.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
programme.desc: Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary. Whether hes battling an evil fast-food empire, facing off against a sentient AI in love with his mom, or trying to stop Banana Joe from wearing pants, Gumball Watterson drags his brother Darwin, sister Anais, and the rest of the town of Elmore along for the ride.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball’s world is pretty run-of-the-mill. He’s chased around school by a T-Rex. He has a friend named Anton who’s a piece of toast. He’s got a crush on Penny, a peanut with antlers. His dad is a 6’4” bunny. His mom works at a Rainbow Factory. And his brother is a goldfish named Darwin. Yup, everything looks perfectly normal.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: From Warner Bros. Animation, these teen titans are on the go! Right after they make a sandwich or play some video games. Wait, theres laundry to do? ("Not it!") After that, theyll definitely go fight some crime. Maybe. Dont miss the return of Robin, Starfire, Raven, Beast Boy and Cyborg - teen super heroes who are totally unsupervised!.

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: Steven Universe is about the misadventures of a boy named Steven, the ultimate "little brother" to a team of magical guardians of humanity—the Crystal Gems. Steven may not be as powerful as the Crystal Gems. Or as savvy. But that doesnt stop him from joining Garnet, Amethyst and Pearl on their magical adventures and somehow finding a way to save the day!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: World sports bulletin focusing on all the action from the international athletic arena and stars of the sport scene.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. Regular updates from Beijing and Washington D.C. keep viewers up-to-date with all the worlds top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. Regular updates from Beijing and Washington D.C. keep viewers up-to-date with all the worlds top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. Regular updates from Beijing and Washington D.C. keep viewers up-to-date with all the worlds top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTNs Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the regions top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Leaders Talk
programme.desc: Leaders Talk is China Media Groups new current affairs program featuring one-on-one interviews with heads of state and high-ranking government officials and heads of international organizations.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. Regular updates from Beijing and Washington D.C. keep viewers up-to-date with all the worlds top stories as they happen.

programme.title: China 24

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTNs brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the worlds most powerful laser and the worlds smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occams Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ""living in the future"!

programme.title: Founder Effect
programme.desc: The DNA of every successful company comes from its founders. Dig into the stories of the people behind top brands.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Leader’s Playbook” is an in-depth series that features exclusive, candid interviews with America’s top CEOs and explores the leadership philosophies and the strategic and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies. Hosted by CNBC’s Senior Media and Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin, each episode offers a rare glimpse into the mindset of visionary leaders, revealing how they navigate challenges, drive innovation, and build success.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions’ is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: The CNBC Conversation
programme.desc: A show that lets the person talk for themselves and gives audiences a glimpse at the personality behind the public persona. Heads of State, titans of business and celebrated stars sit down for the CNBC Conversation.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich. Their complex scams leave victims lives in shambles. Each episode is a deep dive into the minds and actions of heartless crooks who live lives most people can only dream of.

programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Die "Tageschau" bietet die wichtigsten Nachrichten des Tages und zusatzliche Informationen in Text, Bild, Audio und Video sowie umfassende Berichte und Hintergrunde zu aktuellen Themen und Entwicklungen.

programme.title: Milchgeld. Ein Kluftingerkrimi
programme.desc: Ein Mord, ausgerechnet in Kommissar Kluftingers (Herbert Knaup) beschaulichem Heimatdorf Altusried. Der Betriebsleiter der ortlichen Molkerei wurde erdrosselt. Unter den Augen seines Vaters (Tilo Pruckner), der sich fur den Mord in der Nachbarschaft ebenso interessiert, ermittelt Kluftinger hartnackig und mit sicherem Instinkt und tritt dabei manch einem in seinem Umkreis naher als ihm lieb ist.

programme.title: Hubert und Staller
programme.desc: Die in Wolfratshausen Dienst versehenden bayerischen Streifenpolizisten Franz Hubert und Johannes Staller geraten bei Situationen aus dem Polizeialltag in Falle hinein, die eigentlich auSSerhalb ihres Kompetenzbereiches liegen. Trotzdem gelingt es ihnen, die Straftaten aufzuklaren, wobei Hubert die Dienstvorschriften starker beachtet als Staller, der nach seinem Willen ermittelt

programme.title: Mein Traum, meine Geschichte
programme.desc: Die fur Kinder ausgelegte Reportagereihe „Mein Traum, meine Geschichte“ zeigt Menschen, die sich in den vergangenen Jahrzehnten mit ganz besonderen Leistungen verdient gemacht haben. Sei es die Unternehmerin Margarete Steiff, die ein erfolgreiches Imperium aufbauen konnte oder die Verhaltensforscherin Jane Goodall, die sich viele Jahre lang dem Studium des Sozialverhaltens von Schimpansen widmete. Allen vorgestellten Personlichkeiten – von Willy Brandt bis Thomas Edison – ist gemein, dass sie ihre Zeit maSSgeblich gepragt haben.

programme.title: Tigerenten Club
programme.desc: Zwei Schulklassen treten jeweils als Tigerenten- und Froscheteam zusammen mit ihren Lehrern in Spielen gegeneinander an. Das Verliererteam schickt seinen Lehrer am Ende des Spiels baden, die Gewinnerklasse erhalt auSSerdem Sachpreise.

programme.title: Ostwind 3 - Aufbruch nach Ora
programme.desc: Nach einem Streit mit ihrer GroSSmutter stiehlt sich Mika vom Kaltenbachhof davon und bricht mit ihrem Hengst Ostwind auf nach Andalusien, wo sie die Wurzeln des Pferdes vermutet. Dort kommt sie auf der Hacienda von Pedro und seiner Tochter Samantha unter. Bei ihren Ausritten entdeckt sie eine Herde Wildpferde, die Verwandte von Ostwind sein konnten. Als sie erfahrt, dass der Lebensraum der Pferde bedroht ist, will sie mit Hilfe einer alten Tradition die Tiere retten.

programme.title: Racko - Ein Hund fur alle Falle
programme.desc: Im Mittelpunkt der Serie RACKO - Ein Hund fur alle Falle steht der 12-jahrige Flori, der von seinem GroSSvater einen Bauernhof erbt.

programme.title: Racko - Ein Hund fur alle Falle
programme.desc: Im Mittelpunkt der Serie RACKO - Ein Hund fur alle Falle steht der 12-jahrige Flori, der von seinem GroSSvater einen Bauernhof erbt.

programme.title: Die Sendung mit der Maus
programme.desc: Lach- und Sachgeschichten, Slapstick mit Oskar, Armins verrucktem Fruhstuck, einem Tanzwettbewerb auf der Farm – und naturlich mit der Maus, dem Elefanten und der Ente.

programme.title: Tagesschau

programme.title: Gottesdienst zur Eroffnung der Misereor Fastenaktion
programme.desc: Aus der Kirche Sankt Peter und Paul in Hofheim am Taunus ubertragt der Hessische Rundfunk am 1. Fastensonntag den Gottesdienst zur Eroffnung der diesjahrigen Fastenaktion des katholischen Hilfswerks "Misereor" unter dem Leitwort "Hier fangt Zukunft an" mit dem Limburger Bischof Dr. Georg Batzing und Gasten aus Kamerun.

programme.title: Der Prinz im Barenfell
programme.desc: Prinz Marius ist die tagliche Visite des Barbiers wichtiger als die Brautsuche. Mit den Damen am Hofe treibt er nur seine Spielchen. Eines Tages gerat er in eine Falle des Teufels. Dem Prinzen bleibt nur ein Ausweg: Er erhalt seine Freiheit zuruck, wenn es ihm gelingt, bis zur nachsten Tag- und Nachtgleiche eine Frau zu finden, die ihn von Herzen liebt. Was der Prinz fur eine leichte Aufgabe halt, entpuppt sich als Fluch. Denn hinterlistig schickt der Teufel Marius in Gestalt eines furchteinfloSSenden Baren auf Brautschau.

programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Die "Tageschau" bietet die wichtigsten Nachrichten des Tages und zusatzliche Informationen in Text, Bild, Audio und Video sowie umfassende Berichte und Hintergrunde zu aktuellen Themen und Entwicklungen.

programme.title: Presseclub
programme.desc: Im ARD-Presseclub diskutieren Journalistinnen und Journalisten aus dem In- und Ausland aktuelle politische Ereignisse und Entwicklungen. Im Dialog entsteht ein Wettstreit der Meinungen und Interpretationen aktueller politischer Vorgange. Durch die Sendungen fuhren im Wechsel Volker Herres, Jorg Schonenborn und Sonia Seymour Mikich. Im anschlieSSenden "Presseclub nachgefragt" konnen Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauer uber die WDR 5 Hotline mit den Beteiligten der Sendung weiterdiskutieren und Fragen stellen.

programme.title: Europamagazin

programme.title: Amerikas Naturwunder
programme.desc: In Arizona liegt die ungewohnlichste Wuste Nordamerikas. Extreme Temperaturen, endlose Durren, Wind und gefraSSige Raubtiere stellen die Wustenbewohner auf die standige Probe.

programme.title: Hilfe, die Familie kommt!
programme.desc: Die erfolgreiche Verlegerin Susanne Bredemeyer bekommt zum 60. Geburtstag ein auSSergewohnliches Geschenk von ihrem Ehemann Leo: ein romantisches Landhaus mit Seeblick in Schweden. Fernab des Alltags wollen die beiden, deren Ehe seit geraumer Zeit in Routine erstarrt ist, einen Neuanfang wagen.

programme.title: Tatort
programme.desc: Die Tatort-Kommissare des Ersten sind dem Verbrechen auf der Spur.

programme.title: Tagesthemen
programme.desc: Die Sendung "Tagesthemen" vermittelt erganzende Informationen zu den tagesaktuellen Ereignissen aus der ganzen Welt, zeigen dessen Zusammenhange und Hintergrunde.

programme.title: Oderbruch
programme.desc: In der Nahe des kleinen Dorfes Krewlow wird auf einem Feld ein Berg von Leichen und Tierkadavern gefunden. Die unzahligen Morde reichen uber Jahrzehnte zuruck. Kommissar Roland Voit soll die Untersuchungen an der Seite des polnischen Kripobeamten Stanislaw Zajak unterstutzen. Auch Voits ehemalige Kollegin und Jugendliebe Maggie Kring wird zu den Ermittlungen hinzugezogen. Gemeinsam, und doch jeder fur sich, versuchen die drei hinter das Geheimnis des Leichenberges zu dringen.

programme.title: Oderbruch
programme.desc: In der Nahe des kleinen Dorfes Krewlow wird auf einem Feld ein Berg von Leichen und Tierkadavern gefunden. Die unzahligen Morde reichen uber Jahrzehnte zuruck. Kommissar Roland Voit soll die Untersuchungen an der Seite des polnischen Kripobeamten Stanislaw Zajak unterstutzen. Auch Voits ehemalige Kollegin und Jugendliebe Maggie Kring wird zu den Ermittlungen hinzugezogen. Gemeinsam, und doch jeder fur sich, versuchen die drei hinter das Geheimnis des Leichenberges zu dringen.

programme.title: Zu guter Letzt
programme.desc: Harriet Lauler (Shirley MacLaine) hat in ihrem Leben nie etwas dem Zufall uberlassen. So mochte es die wohlhabende Ruhestandlerin auch mit ihrem Vermachtnis halten. In ihrem Auftrag soll daher die junge Journalistin Anne Sherman (Amanda Seyfried) schon zu Lebzeiten einen Nachruf verfassen, der sie nach ihrem Ableben als Familienmensch, Vorbild und Wohltaterin im allerbesten Licht erscheinen lassen wird. Naturlich hat Harriet, Kontrollfreak durch und durch, eine Liste mit den zu befragenden Stichwortgebern erstellt: vom Exmann (Philip Baker Hall) bis zur Friseurin, alle alphabetisch sortiert. Leider weiSS niemand etwas Positives uber die vereinsamte Kratzburste zu berichten - nicht einmal ihre Tochter Elizabeth (Anne Heche). Kein Wunder, dass die Auftraggeberin mit dem ersten Entwurf von Anne alles andere als zufrieden ist. Also beschlieSSt Harriet, ab sofort Einiges zu andern – naturlich in Begleitung ihrer Chronistin. Mit der gewohnten Portion Zynismus sucht die Selfmade-Erfolgsfrau ein gutiges Werk aus, um die Nachwelt zu beeindrucken: Sie mochte dem Leben eines schwarzen Madchens aus schwierigen Verhaltnissen eine Wende geben. Um die neunjahrige Brenda (AnnJewel Lee Dixon) fur ihren Plan zu gewinnen, muss sich die Wohltaterin allerdings ins Zeug legen, denn das Madchen hat seinen eigenen Kopf. Dass Harriet endlich mal wieder so richtig gefordert ist, setzt ungeahnte Energie frei – und lasst nicht nur bei ihr neue Lebensfreude aufkommen.Mit Shirley MacLaine, Amanda Seyfried, Anne Heche, Thomas Sadoski, Philip Baker Hall u.a. | Buch: Stuart Ross Fink

programme.title: Putin und Trump
programme.desc: „Putin interessiert sich nicht fur Geld. Er interessiert sich nicht fur Geschafte. Er mochte Wladimir der GroSSe sein.“ Das sagt Kurt Voker, der wahrend Trumps erster Prasidentschaft der amerikanische Gesandte in der Ukraine war und sich viel mit der Lage in Osteuropa beschaftigt hat. Der amerikanische Prasident Trump hingegen sei ganz anders: „Er sieht in Kriegen eine Verschwendung von Talent und Geld. Frieden schaffen und dann Geschafte machen. Das ist es, was er gerne tun wurde.“Was treibt die beiden Manner an der Weltspitze an?

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: This trip is no joyful nudist holiday, and the protagonists of this documentary series simply dont have time to feel ashamed about their lack of clothing. They have much bigger problems to contend with. This is a matter of sheer survival! Randomly paired couples who have never met before must survive 21 days in the most inhospitable regions of the world – without equipment or food supplies. Due to the dangers they face on these survival trips, the lack of clothing quickly becomes a minor issue. On the Yucatán Peninsula, in the jungles of Nicaragua, and in the Smoky Mountains, entirely different things take priority. Here, the naked couples not only have to find food and clean drinking water – they also have to contend with wild animals: aggressive big cats, poisonous spiders, and hungry bears make life difficult for the adventurers.

programme.title: Scrappers
programme.desc: Industrial, messy and sweaty -- scrap metal work is a highly dangerous profession, and these tough men and women are working the scrapyards of Poland on a daily basis.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.desc: The extraordinary, often bizarre treasures housed in Americas museums represent wondrous chapters in history, but a physical display can tell only part of their story. Behind each artefact are amazing tales and secrets to be revealed - tales sometimes brimming with scandal, mystery, murder and intrigue. In `Mysteries at the Museum, presenter Don Wildman visits a wide variety of museums across the United States, taking viewers on a sometimes shocking tour of Americas past by re-examining whats been left behind. Interviews, archival footage and re-enactments bring to life the artefacts enduring mysteries, some that have never been told before on television.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Master of mystery Josh Gates explores a treasure trove of mind-bending mysteries, carefully curated during his two decades of travelling the globe. Josh travels through history on a search to uncover new evidence and answers to the worlds most captivating unexplained mysteries, and true stories that defy explanation, offering stunning revelations and surprising new insights.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Modern day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard is one of the UKs top decorative antique dealers. Always on the hunt for that elusive gem, Drew travels the length and breadth of the country in search of weird and wonderful objects. The bigger the hoard of forgotten antiques and dusty furniture, the happier Drew is!

programme.title: American Loggers
programme.desc: Nine brothers carry on the family tradition of harvesting the forests of the northern Maine. Its one of the worlds most hazardous jobs and takes guts and dedication to make a living out of the trees.

programme.title: Building Off The Grid
programme.desc: From the edge of an active volcano in Hawaii and the Appalachian Mountains to the deserts of New Mexico and upstate New York, builders battle harsh conditions to construct innovative, self-sufficient homes in remote areas across the country.

programme.title: Tiny House Hunters
programme.desc: Homebuyers across the country hunt for tiny houses that fit their lifestyle. They view multiple homes under 600 square feet before deciding if they are ready to join the tiny house movement.

programme.title: Tiny House Hunters
programme.desc: Homebuyers across the country hunt for tiny houses that fit their lifestyle. They view multiple homes under 600 square feet before deciding if they are ready to join the tiny house movement.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire
programme.desc: Self-made billionaire Glenn Stearns grew up poor in the sticks of Maryland and was only 14 years old when he became a father. A few years ago, however, he sold his company for $2.2 billion and is ready to put his money where his mouth is by making another million in only 90 days with just $100 in his pocket. If he succeeds, hell give that money back to the people that helped him along the way, but if he fails, those same people will each get $1 million of his own money.

programme.title: Truth Behind the Moon Landing
programme.desc: The 1969 moon landing is the subject of numerous conspiracy theories asking whether it really happened. Could it have been faked for propaganda purposes?

programme.title: NASAs Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Since the launch of the manned space program over 50 years ago, cameras aboard NASA spacecrafts have captured hundreds of objects, the nature of which cannot properly be explained. NASA’S UNEXPLAINED FILES expands on some of the strangest unexplained happenings on record – all of which were caught on camera.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items entering the country. Its their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain
programme.desc: Follows the interventions of the Security and Customs Services at the borders of Spain who are under the constant threat from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: In the face of an economic meltdown, six men will risk everything to strike it rich mining for gold. Todd Hoffman, along with his father, is leading a group of greenhorn miners in search of the American dream and a new frontier. Gold fever is back, and the rush is on. The gold miners of the Yukon are back to put everything on the line in the hopes of striking it rich. With new miners, new claims and new machines, the stakes are higher than ever!

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Its the deadliest job on earth: crab fishing off the Alaska coast on the icy Bering Sea, home of the most violent waters on earth. programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Its the deadliest job on earth: crab fishing off the Alaska coast on the icy Bering Sea, home of the most violent waters on earth. programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: This trip is no joyful nudist holiday, and the protagonists of this documentary series simply dont have time to feel ashamed about their lack of clothing. They have much bigger problems to contend with. This is a matter of sheer survival! Randomly paired couples who have never met before must survive 21 days in the most inhospitable regions of the world – without equipment or food supplies. Due to the dangers they face on these survival trips, the lack of clothing quickly becomes a minor issue. On the Yucatán Peninsula, in the jungles of Nicaragua, and in the Smoky Mountains, entirely different things take priority. Here, the naked couples not only have to find food and clean drinking water – they also have to contend with wild animals: aggressive big cats, poisonous spiders, and hungry bears make life difficult for the adventurers.

programme.title: Fast N Loud (Mega)
programme.desc: Fast N Loud searches Americas virtual graveyard for classic cars. From 57 Chevys to 73 Trans Ams, these cars are begging to be brought back to life. To most theyre just rust buckets but to Richard Rawlings, Aaron Kaufmann and the Gas Monkey Garage crew, theyre a goldmine. In fact thats their specialty, they turn rust into gold.

programme.title: Ed Staffords Rite Of Passage

programme.title: Dual Survival
programme.desc: Military-trained Dave Canterbury and naturalist Cody Lundin take on some of the planets most unforgiving terrain to demonstrate in their own way how the right skills and some creative thinking can keep you alive.

programme.title: Darkness
programme.desc: Inspired by extreme training scenarios three strangers each episode will push themselves to their absolute limits in complete darkness - enduring days buried underground while navigating prehistoric cave systems, ancient subterranean cities and centuries-old abandoned mines.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: The Kilcher family lives on a 600-acre homestead in Alaska. For four generations, they have lived off the land in a subsistence lifestyle. With another brutal winter quickly approaching, the entire homestead struggles to stockpile enough meat and firewood to last. See how they not only survive, but thrive on Alaska: The Last Frontier.

programme.desc: Programleder og mekaniker Sam Lovegrove og motorsykkelguru Henry Cole leter etter gamle motorskatter de kan restaurere og tjene penger på i bortgjemte skur over hele Storbritannia. (Shed and Buried)

programme.title: Skjulte skatter: Klassiske biler
programme.desc: Drew sammen med Bilgurun Paul Cowland finner, kjøper, reparerer og selger klassiske biler.

programme.title: Skjulte skatter: Klassiske biler
programme.desc: Drew sammen med Bilgurun Paul Cowland finner, kjøper, reparerer og selger klassiske biler.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers: Dream Car
programme.desc: Mike og Elvis gir deg den ultimate guiden til å kjøpe drømmebilen. Undervisningen inkluderer besøk på auksjoner, bilutstillinger, skraputsalg og Mikes egen gårdsplass.

programme.title: Bilfikserne
programme.desc: Programlederne Mike Brewer og Edd China viser seerne hvordan man kan kjøpe riktig bil til riktig pris, restaurere den billig, og tjene en god slump med penger.

programme.title: Kindig Customs: Road To The Ridler
programme.desc: Høydepunktet i verdenen for spesialbygde biler er Don Ridler-prisen, som deles ut hvert år på Detroit Autorama... og Dave vil vinne.

programme.title: Kindig Customs: Road To The Ridler
programme.desc: Høydepunktet i verdenen for spesialbygde biler er Don Ridler-prisen, som deles ut hvert år på Detroit Autorama... og Dave vil vinne.

programme.title: Fanget på politiets kamera Sverige
programme.desc: Ved hjelp av autentisk materiale fra politiets egne kameraer, følger vi det svenske politiets hverdag i arbeidet med å løse forbrytelser.

programme.title: Inside The Arrest
programme.desc: En aristokrat rømmer med partneren og babyen sin midt på vinteren. Politiet er redd barnet ikke vil overleve, og kjemper mot klokka for å finne henne.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: Dave Kindig driver Kindig-It Design og lager unike kjøretøy til sine kravstore, og noen ganger berømte kunder.

programme.title: Kindig Customs: Road To The Ridler
programme.desc: Høydepunktet i verdenen for spesialbygde biler er Don Ridler-prisen, som deles ut hvert år på Detroit Autorama... og Dave vil vinne.

programme.title: Verdens myter og mysterier
programme.desc: Vi følger Josh Gates når han undersøker kjente mysterier rundt om i verden. Etter å ha satt seg inn i saken, starter han jakten på svar. Dette tøffe og ekte eventyret fører Gates nærmere sannheten bak mange av de store ubesvarte gåtene fra alle deler av verden.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: Experts explore the latest evidence, eyewitness encounters and active investigations while unveiling their theories about infamous monsters and their origins.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Josh Gates puts together a top team of experts to undertake expeditions into unexplained mysteries. They venture round the world in their quest for the truth.

programme.title: Dino Hunters
programme.desc: Ankylosaurus, Triceratops, or Velociraptor: Where cattle graze today, dinosaurs ruled the earth until 65 million years ago. Now, the remains of these prehistoric giants lie buried in sedimentary rock, waiting to be unearthed. Dino hunters like Clayton Phipps, Jared Hudson, and Mike Harris are taking on the task. Ranchers and cowboys want to turn these prehistoric treasures into cash! The fossil discoveries are also important for science. Using 3D scanners and high-tech computer models, experts are bringing the hidden world of dinosaurs back to life.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey er en seks-årig glad og energisk australsk Blue Heeler hund, der elsker at lege og forvandler familiens hverdag til fantastiske eventyr, der gavner både Blueys fantasi og hendes mentale, fysiske og følelsesmæssige styrke.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey er en seks-årig glad og energisk australsk Blue Heeler hund, der elsker at lege og forvandler familiens hverdag til fantastiske eventyr, der gavner både Blueys fantasi og hendes mentale, fysiske og følelsesmæssige styrke.

programme.title: Superkitties
programme.desc: Superkillingerne - Bitten, Rosa, Kvik og Mester - er tilbage, og de er superenergiske! Teamet er på en mission for at rette op på uret og gøre verden til et venligere og mere potetastisk sted.

programme.title: Mickeys klubhus+
programme.desc: Mickey og hans venner byder alle velkommen i klubhuset til helt nye og plussede eventyr fyldt med sange, latter, fikse fingre og sjove nye overraskelser!

programme.title: Bluey

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: Spidey, vores yndlings spindsvinger, slår sig sammen med Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) og Miles Morales for at skabe Spidey-teamet med hjælp fra Spideys komiske, men loyale spider-bot, TRACE-E. Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Iron Man og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: "Marvels Iron Man og hans utrolige venner" følger supergenierne og bedstevennerne mens de arbejder sammen om at løse problemer og beskytte deres by.

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner

Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: Vee forlader Transsylvanien for at tage på kostskole for at forfølge sine musikalske drømme. Da hun holder sin vampyridentitet skjult, truer uventede forhindringer med at sende hende tilbage til skyggerne.

programme.title: Magi efter Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie, en magtfuld ung troldmand i centrum for en mystisk profeti, bliver sendt til at leve i den dødelige verden med den eneste troldmandslærer, der kan hjælpe hende med at kontrollere sine kræfter - Justin Russo.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Serien handler om Kiff, et optimistisk egern, hvis livsappetit fører hende ud på utallige eventyr rundt om i hjembyen, sammen med hendes afslappede bedsteven, Barry. I en verden, hvor dyr og magiske særlinge takler hverdagen sammen, styrer duoen gennem skole, kammeratskaber og deres ofte excentriske lokalsamfund.

programme.title: Kiff

I en verden, hvor dyr og magiske særlinge takler hverdagen sammen, styrer duoen gennem skole, kammeratskaber og deres ofte excentriske lokalsamfund.

programme.title: Rip, Rap og Rup på eventyr
programme.desc: Da Anders And forlader Andeby for at tilslutte sig flåden, overlades Rip, Rap og Rup i Onkel Joakims varetægt. Joakim har dog ikke meget tid til familie, da han har travlt med at beskytte sin enorme formue fra Bjørnebanden.

programme.title: Et godt grin!
programme.desc: Det er Plutos fødselsdagsfest!

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Et godt grin!
programme.desc: Mickey, Anders og Fedtmule prøver at rengøre et ur i et tårn.

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner (kortfilm)
programme.desc: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner samarbejder for at bekæmpe skurke og redde folk i problemer. Mød heltene, som hjælper Spidey med at redde dagen!

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Bluey

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: Spidey, vores yndlings spindsvinger, slår sig sammen med Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) og Miles Morales for at skabe Spidey-teamet med hjælp fra Spideys komiske, men loyale spider-bot, TRACE-E. Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Magi efter Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie, en magtfuld ung troldmand i centrum for en mystisk profeti, bliver sendt til at leve i den dødelige verden med den eneste troldmandslærer, der kan hjælpe hende med at kontrollere sine kræfter - Justin Russo.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Serien handler om Kiff, et optimistisk egern, hvis livsappetit fører hende ud på utallige eventyr rundt om i hjembyen, sammen med hendes afslappede bedsteven, Barry. I en verden, hvor dyr og magiske særlinge takler hverdagen sammen, styrer duoen gennem skole, kammeratskaber og deres ofte excentriske lokalsamfund.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Magi efter Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie, en magtfuld ung troldmand i centrum for en mystisk profeti, bliver sendt til at leve i den dødelige verden med den eneste troldmandslærer, der kan hjælpe hende med at kontrollere sine kræfter - Justin Russo.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Serien handler om Kiff, et optimistisk egern, hvis livsappetit fører hende ud på utallige eventyr rundt om i hjembyen, sammen med hendes afslappede bedsteven, Barry. I en verden, hvor dyr og magiske særlinge takler hverdagen sammen, styrer duoen gennem skole, kammeratskaber og deres ofte excentriske lokalsamfund.

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas Flynn and his resourceful stepbrother, Ferb Fletcher, happily set out to conquer boredom and make every day of their 104-day summer vacation count. Among their fun-filled projects are building a full-scale roller coaster, creating a new season called swinter, becoming overnight pop music sensations, building a backyard beach complete with a surf competition, and traveling back in time to the Jurassic period.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: “Big City Greens” is an animated comedy-adventure series which follows the offbeat adventures of 10-year-old Cricket Green, a mischievous and optimistic country boy who moves to the big city with his wildly out of place family – older sister Tilly, father Bill and Gramma Alice. Cricket’s natural curiosity and enthusiasm lead him and his family on epic journeys and into the hearts of his new neighbours.

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Gretels teen brother, Kevin, on the other hand, was overlooked by the aliens, and is stuck being "superhero adjacent." However, he is often the brains behind each mission! Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!

programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien are back for more exciting adventures! Among their fun-filled projects are building a full-scale roller coaster, creating a new season called swinter, becoming overnight pop music sensations, building a backyard beach complete with a surf competition, and traveling back in time to the Jurassic period.

programme.title: Disneys Have a Laugh!
programme.desc: Time flies for Mickey, Goofy and Donald on top of a clock tower in a classic Disney cartoon.

programme.title: Meet Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Team Spidey swings into adventure and saves the community from more villains than ever before! Good thing theyve got more help. Meet our web-slinging Super Heroes new friends: Iron Man, Reptile, and Ant-Man and Wasp. When they work together, the baddies just wont stand a chance!

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Spidey, our favorite web-slinger is teaming up with Ghost-Spider and Miles Morales to make up The Spidey Team, with some assistance from Spidey’s comical but loyal Spider-bot, TRACE-E. If Spidey finds himself in a sticky situation that needs even more super-hero power, rest assured that an Avenger pal will race in to help out.

programme.title: Iron Man and His Awesome Friends
programme.desc: "Marvel’s Iron Man and his Awesome Friends” follows the adventures of best friends and super geniuses as they work together to solve problems and protect their city.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse+
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals welcome everyone to the Clubhouse for all-new, plussed-up adventures filled with songs, laughs, handy helping, and fun new surprises!

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: A teenage girl from Transylvania enrolls in boarding school to chase her musical dreams, and she attempts to keep it a secret that she is actually a vampire while navigating various obstacles and challenges along the way.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: “Big City Greens” is an animated comedy-adventure series which follows the offbeat adventures of 10-year-old Cricket Green, a mischievous and optimistic country boy who moves to the big city with his wildly out of place family – older sister Tilly, father Bill and Gramma Alice. Cricket’s natural curiosity and enthusiasm lead him and his family on epic journeys and into the hearts of his new neighbours.

programme.title: Kiff

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Gretels teen brother, Kevin, on the other hand, was overlooked by the aliens, and is stuck being "superhero adjacent." However, he is often the brains behind each mission! Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: “Big City Greens” is an animated comedy-adventure series which follows the offbeat adventures of 10-year-old Cricket Green, a mischievous and optimistic country boy who moves to the big city with his wildly out of place family – older sister Tilly, father Bill and Gramma Alice. Cricket’s natural curiosity and enthusiasm lead him and his family on epic journeys and into the hearts of his new neighbours.

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Gretels teen brother, Kevin, on the other hand, was overlooked by the aliens, and is stuck being "superhero adjacent." However, he is often the brains behind each mission! Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!
